gt_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Examination AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T1.Admission = '+' AND STRFTIME('%Y', T2.`Examination Date`) - STRFTIME('%Y', T1.`First Date`) >= 1
pred_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 LEFT JOIN Examination AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE strftime('%Y', T2."Examination Date") - strftime('%Y', T1."First Date") >= 1;
question: How many patients hadn't undergone a medical examination until at least a year following their initial hospital visit?
